name: Itzhak Perlman
abstract: Itzhak Perlman (Hebrew: יצחק פרלמן; born August 31, 1945) is an Israeli-American violinist. He has performed worldwide and throughout the United States, in venues that have included a state dinner for Elizabeth II at the White House in 2007, and at the 2009 inauguration of Barack Obama.

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: I did a… Andre Previn got me involved in this project with Itzhak Perlman... And I thought it was kind of… I think this was Shelly’s idea. He thought we would do a “free piece.”... So we did, we did a free piece
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Toots Thielemans
about_quotes.evidence: he did even a duo with Itzhak Perlman, the handicapped violin virtuoso. I don’t know what his story…
about_quotes.doc_title: Toots Thielemans — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
